response: We follow: 2-space indentation, camelCase for variables, PascalCase for classes, snake_case for constants. Max line length 100. Use ESLint config in repo root. Run 'npm run lint' before committing.

Standard structure: src/ (source code), tests/ (unit tests), docs/ (documentation), .github/ (CI/CD), config/ (configuration). Each module is self-contained with clear interfaces and comprehensive tests.

Pipeline: git push → GitHub Actions tests → staging deploy (if tests pass) → manual review → production deploy. All changes go through PR review first. Production deployments Monday-Thursday, 10am-2pm only.
Lock files committed to repo (package-lock.json, Gemfile.lock). No major version bumps without discussion. Security patches fast-tracked. Weekly dependency audit. Use tools: Dependabot, Snyk.
Feature branches from main. Commit message format: 'type(scope): description'. Push to origin. Create PR with description. Require 2 approvals. Squash merge. Delete branch. Main always deployable.
